channel.title: The Juno Desk
channel.description: Verified AI news and practical tool guides for office workers. No hype, no robots-will-kill-us panic. Just what changes your workday.

item.title: Clean Messy Excel Data With AI — Without Learning a Single Formula
item.description: Duplicates, broken dates, columns that should be three columns. A step-by-step guide to fixing messy spreadsheets with an LLM — no formulas required.

item.title: Write Emails and Reports That Don't Sound Like a Robot: The AI Editing SOP
item.description: AI drafts your email in ten seconds. Making it sound like you takes a better prompt. Here is the framework, with before-and-after examples.

item.title: Survive Meetings with AI: The Complete Transcript-to-Action-Item SOP
item.description: The meeting was an hour. The useful part was four sentences. Let AI find them for you — a beginner's workflow that works on day one.
